title: Food Lover’s Market Knysna: Best in fresh
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be chosen...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be chosen as winners in several categories of the Best of Knysna & Plett 2025 Readers’ Choice Award. From your full trolleys to your votes, thank you for letting us be part of your everyday. We mean it!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be chosen as winners in several categories of the Best of Knysna & Plett 2025 Readers’ Choice Award. From your full trolleys to your votes, thank you for letting us be part of your everyday. We mean it!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We are extremely proud to be named:"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Fresh Produce Store","Best Biltong","Best Convenience Store,","Best Supermarket and","Best Food & Drink Destination"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When your destination is flavour and your first stop is fresh, you know you’ve arrived at Food Lover’s Market.","html":"When your destination is flavour and your first stop is fresh, you know you’ve arrived at Food Lover’s Market."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fresh is where it all began; freshness is in our roots. Whether you’re topping up on fresh avos or picking up juicy citrus for these cold winter days, our fruit and veg section is packed with colour, abundance, flavour, and great value. It’s all thanks to the strong relationships we have built with local farmers over the years.","html":"Fresh is where it all began; freshness is in our roots. Whether you’re topping up on fresh avos or picking up juicy citrus for these cold winter days, our fruit and veg section is packed with colour, abundance, flavour, and great value. It’s all thanks to the strong relationships we have built with local farmers over the years."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"That’s how we keep our shelves full and our prices honest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That weekend biltong craving? Prepare for a new daily obsession. Our Biltong Bar, also known as the Home of Biltong, has a wide variety of options.","html":"That weekend biltong craving? Prepare for a new daily obsession. Our Biltong Bar, also known as the Home of Biltong, has a wide variety of options."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you prefer dry, wet, chilli, droëwors, or something in between, there’s something for everyone, every day.","html":"Whether you prefer dry, wet, chilli, droëwors, or something in between, there’s something for everyone, every day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"And while we’re on the topic of cravings…"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our Smash Shack burgers, hot food section, sushi, and snack selection make us an easy stop when life is too busy to cook, but you still want a delicious meal.","html":"Our Smash Shack burgers, hot food section, sushi, and snack selection make us an easy stop when life is too busy to cook, but you still want a delicious meal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re feeding the family or grabbing a quick lunch, Food Lover’s Market is the place to go.","html":"Whether you’re feeding the family or grabbing a quick lunch, Food Lover’s Market is the place to go."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re not just here for your weekly shop. Whether it’s a full trolley, a last-minute salad, or a quick pantry top-up, our new store in Knysna is built for real life and real people.","html":"We’re not just here for your weekly shop. Whether it’s a full trolley, a last-minute salad, or a quick pantry top-up, our new store in Knysna is built for real life and real people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’ve got: 14 regular tills, 2 express lanes, wide aisles, digital screens, and a full-on 3 600m² of food heaven (our Theatre of Food). Whether you shop fast, full, or just for now, we’ve made it easy.","html":"We’ve got: 14 regular tills, 2 express lanes, wide aisles, digital screens, and a full-on 3 600m² of food heaven (our Theatre of Food). Whether you shop fast, full, or just for now, we’ve made it easy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our fruit and veg section is packed with colour, abundance, flavour, and great value.","html":"Our fruit and veg section is packed with colour, abundance, flavour, and great value."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This store is led by locals who love it just as much as you do:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hermann Kapp and David Keyser have poured over 30 years of experience and heart into making this space more than just a supermarket. With the revamp, we’re proud to have created over 100 new jobs in the community.","html":"Hermann Kapp and David Keyser have poured over 30 years of experience and heart into making this space more than just a supermarket. With the revamp, we’re proud to have created over 100 new jobs in the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Because at the end of the day, it’s always been about more than food - it’s about people. It’s about changing lives, one shop at a time. To every single person who voted, visited, shopped, supported, and shared kind words, thank you.","html":"Because at the end of the day, it’s always been about more than food - it’s about people. It’s about changing lives, one shop at a time. To every single person who voted, visited, shopped, supported, and shared kind words, thank you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are proud to be your local Food Lover’s Market. And we’ll keep showing up, doing our best, and bringing you Real Food, Real Value every day.","html":"We are proud to be your local Food Lover’s Market. And we’ll keep showing up, doing our best, and bringing you Real Food, Real Value every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you again, Knysna Plett Herald!","html":"Thank you again, Knysna Plett Herald!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
